client_updates.highlight: Lodestar: FCR implementation deployed on 5+ nodes for over a week; PR under team review, expected merge within a week
Grandine: Two pre-existing bugs identified post-spec-merge — relative epoch helper rejecting lookups and unrealized justified checkpoints on fork chains; fix expected by Friday
Nimbus shipped FCR enabled by default, then disabled it after discovering Nethermind safe-head incompatibility with engine API spec; FCR will be re-enabled once Nethermind fix is released
Nethermind fix for safe-head engine API bug merged (PR #11187) but not yet released

spec_and_testing.highlight: Main FCR spec PR merged; not yet gGLOSSS-compatible — work in progress to abstract fork choice layer so FCR works across forks
Spec tests exist for minimal preset only; mainnet preset tests under consideration but constrained by 6-hour CI time limit
Beacon API PR #598 merged: adds FCR confirmed-block events (block root + slot) to event stream

research_updates.highlight: FCR research paper nearly ready for publication; pending review of latest feedback round

metrics_and_observability.highlight: Lodestar already tracks confirmed block slot and finalized slot; distance calculable in Grafana
Dora explorer proposed to be extended to display most-recently confirmed block on devnets

action_items.action: Open PR defining standard FCR metrics (confirmed slot distance, restarts, runtime) for cross-client alignment
Add Grandine (Mercy) to Fast Confirmation Telegram group

decisions.decision: FCR spec will be made gGLOSSS-compatible via fork choice abstraction layer refactor; if infeasible, spec will be made fork-aware instead

targets.target: Next FCR call in approximately two weeks
